mapper.select: SELECT g.GW_ID AS gwId, g.GW_NAME AS gwName, g.THREAD_COUNT AS threadCount, g.GW_PROPERTIES AS gwProperties, g.GW_DESC AS gwDesc, g.GW_APP_NAME AS gwAppName, g.IO_TYPE AS ioType FROM FWK_GATEWAY g WHERE g.GW_ID = #{gwId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_GATEWAY WHERE GW_ID = #{gwId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_GATEWAY ( GW_ID, GW_NAME, THREAD_COUNT, GW_PROPERTIES, GW_DESC, GW_APP_NAME, IO_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{dto.gwId}, #{dto.gwName}, #{dto.threadCount}, #{dto.gwProperties}, #{dto.gwDesc}, #{dto.gwAppName}, #{dto.ioType} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_GATEWAY SET GW_NAME = #{dto.gwName}, THREAD_COUNT = #{dto.threadCount}, GW_PROPERTIES = #{dto.gwProperties}, GW_DESC = #{dto.gwDesc}, GW_APP_NAME = #{dto.gwAppName}, IO_TYPE = #{dto.ioType} WHERE GW_ID = #{dto.gwId}
mapper.sql: g.GW_ID AS gwId, g.GW_NAME AS gwName, g.THREAD_COUNT AS threadCount, g.GW_PROPERTIES AS gwProperties, g.GW_DESC AS gwDesc, g.GW_APP_NAME AS gwAppName, g.IO_TYPE AS ioType
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_GATEWAY
AND GW_ID LIKE '%' || #{gwId} || '%'
AND GW_NAME LIKE '%' || #{gwName} || '%'
AND IO_TYPE = #{ioType}
